name: PFWorkspaceGrid
description: Responsive workspace layout grid driven by Foundation spacing and breakpoints.
responsibility: Arrange workspace regions using Foundation spacing and responsive behavior.

requirements: Reading order must remain logical at every breakpoint.
Responsive collapse should preserve access to all regions.
Layout changes must not trap keyboard navigation.

anti_patterns: custom spacing values outside the Foundation scale
breakpoint behavior that hides critical regions
layout density that obscures the primary workspace
